name: Mori by Art + Flea
tagline: Local fashion, home goods, and art from up-and-coming Hawaii-based artists and designers — each visit feels fresh.
bestTime: First Friday evenings when Chinatown's art walk is happening
talkStory: Born from Art + Flea, Hawaii's first urban street market founded by Jasper Wong in 2011, Mori is the brick-and-mortar evolution in Chinatown. Wong, a muralist and creative director, built Art + Flea to give young local designers a platform beyond tourist-shop trinkets. The shop curates clothing, prints, ceramics, and accessories from up-and-coming Hawaii-based artists. First Friday evenings are when the Chinatown creative community fills the space.
